Yoonsang Lee

CS PhD @ Princeton  ·  yoonsang at princeton dot edu

Hello! I am a Ph.D. student in Computer Science at Princeton University, advised by Danqi Chen. Prior to that, I did my undergrad at Seoul National University, fortunate to be working with Eunsol Choi.

My research focuses on Natural Language Processing. I am interested in making large language models better utilize dynamic information at test time and acquire meaningful knowledge.

Recently I've been thinking about long-horizon agents, test-time training, and human-AI interaction. Feel free to reach out for collaboration!
